message:
fix: Update old type info enum names to Zig 0.15 syntax

- sqlite3/types.zig: .Int/.Float/.Bool/.Pointer/.Optional → lowercase
- code_builder.zig: .Struct.fields → .@"struct".fields
- contextlib.zig: .Fn.return_type → .@"fn".return_type
- comptime_wrapper.zig: .Struct → .@"struct" in @Type constructor
